records.ety: [F., fr. Sp. estrado, orig., a carpet on the floor of a room, also, a carpeted platform, fr. L. stratum bed covering. See Stratum.]

defs: A portion of the floor of a room raised above the general level, as a place for a bed or a throne; a platform; a dais.
quotes: He [the teacher] himself should have his desk on a mounted estrade or platform.
